traits.name: Curious
traits.description: Always wandering off — and it comes back with more.

traits.name: Brave
traits.description: First into the fray, every time.

traits.name: Gentle
traits.description: Softens hardship; keeps its spirits up.

traits.name: Stubborn
traits.description: Refuses to back down from a fight.

traits.name: Playful
traits.description: Finds joy in everything — treats most of all.

traits.name: Shy
traits.description: Happiest tucked away in a quiet corner.

traits.name: Clever
traits.description: Figures things out fast.

traits.name: Loyal
traits.description: Bonds deeper the longer it stays.

traits.name: Restless
traits.description: Can't sit still — quick and light on its feet.

traits.name: Lucky
traits.description: Things just work out.

traits.name: Hardy
traits.description: Weathers anything — and never wastes a meal.

traits.name: Dreamer
traits.description: Eyes on the horizon, mind on the old lore.

traits.name: Quick Learner
traits.description: Trains faster than most.

traits.name: Diligent Forager
traits.description: Always knows where the food is.

traits.name: Skilled Fighter
traits.description: Mastered the basics of combat.

traits.name: Nimble
traits.description: Hard to catch off guard.

traits.name: Studious
traits.description: Pores over the old runes.

traits.name: Pathfinder
traits.description: Always knows the shortcuts.

traits.name: Treasure Seeker
traits.description: Has a nose for shiny things.

traits.name: Merchant's Eye
traits.description: Knows exactly what things are worth.

traits.name: Thrifty
traits.description: Makes every resource last.
traits.effect: −10% Essence cost to Feed, Train & Treat

traits.name: Persistent
traits.description: Sticks with it until the effort pays off.

traits.name: Mentor
traits.description: Teaches the whole pack by example.

traits.name: Sage
traits.description: The forest whispers its secrets to it.

traits.name: Warden
traits.description: Stands watch over the whole team.

traits.name: Emissary
traits.description: Speaks for the spirits, and they answer.

traits.name: Kindred Soul
traits.description: Its heart links to others of its kind.
traits.effect: Aura: +10% XP with a same-species teammate

traits.name: Relic Bearer
traits.description: Touched by ancient things.

traits.name: Wanderer Lord
traits.description: Calls the long roads home, laden with spoils.

traits.name: Ascendant
traits.description: Light follows wherever it walks.
